description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Benchmark that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific branches and paths. The workflow checks if the actor is a bot or if the pull request is from a fork, and if not, it proceeds to run a Conan recipe version job. If that job succeeds, it runs a C++ benchmark job on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, which includes setting up Python, caching dependencies, installing system requirements, building and running the benchmark, and uploading the results to GitHub Pages.
